get.summary: Returns a simple payload indicating whether the AI feature is configured.

post.summary:
Creates a new user account with the default Team Member role.
Registration does not return tokens — authenticate afterwards to obtain them.
post.description: The password must meet the backend complexity rules (minimum 8 characters, upper, lower, digit, special).

post.summary: Authenticates a user and returns access and refresh tokens.

Rotates an existing refresh token pair and returns a new access token
and refresh token. The presented refresh token is revoked.
Revokes the supplied refresh token so it can no longer be exchanged.

requestBody.description: Logout input containing the refresh token.

get.summary: Retrieves dashboard statistics for the current user.
Lists projects visible to the current user, with optional search, sorting, and pagination.

post.summary: Creates a new project. The owner is set to the authenticated caller.

get.summary: Retrieves a single project by id.

put.summary: Updates an existing project. Only the name and description are mutable.

delete.summary: Soft-deletes a project. The project and its tasks are hidden from normal queries.

post.summary: Creates a new task inside the specified project.

get.summary: Lists tasks for a specific project, with optional search, filtering, sorting, and pagination.
Lists tasks visible to the current user across all projects, with optional search, filtering, sorting, and pagination.
Retrieves a single task by id.

delete.summary: Soft-deletes a task. The task is hidden from normal queries.

put.summary: Assigns a task to a user. Pass `null` to clear the assignment.
Changes a task's status. A Team Member may only change status on tasks assigned to them.

post.summary:
Improves a task description using the configured AI provider.
Returns an improved description without modifying the task record.

get.summary: Returns a lightweight directory of users for assignment dropdowns.

Bearer.description: Enter the JWT access token (without the 'Bearer ' prefix).
